title: navarretia cotulifolia var. bowmaniae
intro: Navarretia cotulifolia var. bowmaniae, a rare and endangered variant of the Navarretia cotulifolia plant, is a perennial herb native to California and Washington in the United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
